summary.experimentBacklog: prioritized experiment backlog defined with hypothesis, owner, expected impact and decision horizon
summary.statisticalCriteria: minimum statistical criteria defined per experiment to prevent low-confidence rollout decisions
summary.learningClosure: learning closure workflow defined with explicit outcomes and roadmap linkage

experiments.name: onboarding_friction_reduction
experiments.hypothesis: shorter onboarding copy + guided defaults increases onboarding completion by >= 8%

experiments.name: training_plan_smart_default
experiments.hypothesis: adaptive starter plan improves first session logging by >= 10%

experiments.name: nutrition_reminder_timing
experiments.hypothesis: contextual reminder windows increase D7 nutrition adherence by >= 6%

statisticalGuardrails.stoppingRule: stop only on statistical significance or max window reached
statisticalGuardrails.holdoutPolicy: retain >= 10% control holdout during active experiment

learningClosure.roadmapTraceability: every shipped or iterated experiment must link to V5/V6 backlog item id
